description: AIAuth enterprise managed configuration. Push via Google Workspace Admin Console -> Apps -> Chrome -> Apps & Extensions -> Managed configuration. Fields below override user-configurable defaults.

enterprise_server.description: Customer's self-hosted AIAuth server URL (e.g., https://aiauth.acme.com). Overrides DEFAULT_SERVER on first launch.
enterprise_server.title: AIAuth Server URL

org_domain.description: The primary email domain for your organization (e.g., acme.com). Used to restrict sign-up to corporate emails.
org_domain.title: Organization Email Domain

tier.description: Capture tier for this deployment. 'enterprise' enables commercial fields (tta, sid, dest, classification, concurrent_ai_apps).
tier.title: Capture Tier

require_verification.description: When true, hides the 'Start Attesting (unverified)' button and forces the magic-link verification flow.
require_verification.title: Require Email Verification
